raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/scrub> 2025, I used my Citi Credit Card ( ending in XXXX ) to purchase services totaling {$2900.00} from TN University, and I was charged a 3 % service fee ( {$2900.00} 3 % ) in addition to the purchase amount. 

On XX/XX/year>2025, TN University refunded {$1500.00} due to overcharges. However, they did not refund the {$45.00} service fee ( {$1500.00} 3 % ) that was charged on the overcharged amount. 

I disputed this charge with Citi because I should not be responsible for paying service fees for services I never received. However, Citi failed to protect my legitimate consumer rights and closed my dispute, citing that the merchant was unwilling to issue the refund. 

I am submitting this complaint in the hope that my legitimate rights and interests will be properly protected.
